scripts.build: npm run check:context-duplicates && npm run check:pages-duplicates && npm run check:support-page-boundary && npm run check:app-support-imports && tsc -b && vite build
scripts.check:conflicts: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const root='src';const bad=[];const walk=(d)=>{for(const n of fs.readdirSync(d,{withFileTypes:true})){const p=path.join(d,n.name);if(n.isDirectory()) walk(p); else if(n.isFile() && /\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|css|html|json)$/.test(n.name)){const t=fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8'); if(/^(<<<<<<<|=======|>>>>>>>)$/m.test(t)) bad.push(p);}}}; if(fs.existsSync(root)) walk(root); if(bad.length){console.error('Merge-conflict markers found in:', bad.join(', ')); process.exit(1)} console.log('No merge-conflict markers found in src');"
scripts.validate: npm run check:conflicts && npm run check:context-duplicates && npm run check:pages-duplicates && npm run check:support-page-boundary && npm run check:app-support-imports && npm run build
scripts.check:context-duplicates: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const src=fs.readFileSync('src/lib/AppContext.tsx','utf8');const names=[...src.matchAll(/^ {2}const\s+([A-Za-z_$][\w$]*)\s*=\s*\(/gm)].map(m=>m[1]);const dup=[...new Set(names.filter((n,i)=>names.indexOf(n)!==i))];if(dup.length){console.error('Duplicate top-level const functions in AppContext:',dup.join(', '));process.exit(1)}console.log('No duplicate top-level const functions in AppContext');"
scripts.check:pages-duplicates: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const src=fs.readFileSync('src/pages/pages.tsx','utf8');const names=[...src.matchAll(/^export const\s+([A-Za-z_$][\w$]*)\s*=/gm)].map(m=>m[1]);const dup=[...new Set(names.filter((n,i)=>names.indexOf(n)!==i))];if(dup.length){console.error('Duplicate page exports in src/pages/pages.tsx:',dup.join(', '));process.exit(1)}console.log('No duplicate page exports in src/pages/pages.tsx');"
scripts.check:support-page-boundary: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const pages=fs.readFileSync('src/pages/pages.tsx','utf8');const support=fs.readFileSync('src/pages/supportPages.tsx','utf8');const inPages=[...pages.matchAll(/^export const\s+(ProfileSupport(?:Faq)?Page)\s*=/gm)].map(m=>m[1]);if(inPages.length){console.error('Support pages must not be exported from src/pages/pages.tsx:',inPages.join(', '));process.exit(1)}const inSupport=[...support.matchAll(/^export const\s+(ProfileSupport(?:Faq)?Page)\s*=/gm)].map(m=>m[1]);const need=['ProfileSupportPage','ProfileSupportFaqPage'];const missing=need.filter(n=>!inSupport.includes(n));if(missing.length){console.error('Missing support page exports in src/pages/supportPages.tsx:',missing.join(', '));process.exit(1)}const dup=[...new Set(inSupport.filter((n,i)=>inSupport.indexOf(n)!==i))];if(dup.length){console.error('Duplicate support page exports in src/pages/supportPages.tsx:',dup.join(', '));process.exit(1)}console.log('Support page export boundary is valid');"
